name: sim-hardware-as-code
description: Packages the simulation-in-the-loop, hardware-as-code engineering methodology: one source-of-truth design.json mirrored into the build, every requirement gets an executable scored audit (PASS/WARN/FAIL), uv PEP723 scripts, rerun visualization, the assembly verification ladder, scored tradeoff studies with sensitivity, a tiered FEA stack (analytic -> in-house beam FEA -> gmsh + CalculiX continuum) validated anchor-to-anchor, and the automation-agent manufacturability loop. Ships scaffolders, an audit/tradeoff/FEA/packaging skill set, a methodology subagent, and a living guardrails checklist.
